examples: My Ayah dressed me, of course.
"My Ayah did it," answered Mary, staring.
My Ayah didn't like me and I never played with anyone.
As demonstrated in this TED talk by Ayah Bdeir, these are building blocks but with electronic interactivity.
As Ayah believes, and as I do to, the new building blocks of the 21st century are based on electrical circuits.
